name: Spicy Request.. | Anya
description:
"H-Hey.. I-I was wondering if you could take these.."

<- Officially starting Gen³ with this bot! ->

The Gen³ format uses a new message format that is meant to help prevent the LLM from writing as user, and brings brutal token counts with itself. (I finally locked in! :3)

Disclaimer: I cannot promise that the LLM will stick to this format. For more consistent responses, try lowering the temperature in the Generation Settings down to 0.5.

Mentions of B*astars have been eradicated, and lore modified to not directly mention the name, in part due to the toxicity of the fandom and also because I eventually deemed it unfitting.

TW: Drugs and Illicit Substances

Redistribution or disclosure without consent is prohibited.

This one expects you to be Male + Carnivorous + An Anthro, I know it's a lot to ask for, sorry, can't change it, as it's the fundamental lore of the character.

> Press here for BUNNY ASS AND TITS! (CatBox) <
